task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Dyson V15 Detect (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $749.00 and wholesale is $524.00. Product features: Cordless vacuum with laser dust detection and HEPA filtration. Reference: https://www.dyson.com/vacuum-cleaners/cordless/v15/detect-absolute-nickel

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Dyson V15 Detect. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Dyson V15 Detect. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
